comment.body:
- It is caused by custom filter list in your config `Fuck Fuckadblock (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bogachenko/fuckfuckadblock/master/fuckfuckadblock.txt)`
- a filter responsible is `/\?key=[0-9a-f]{32}$/$document,xhr,match-case,frame,script`
- disable such filter by using user filter such as  `/\?key=[0-9a-f]{32}$/$document,xhr,match-case,frame,script,badfilter` or `@@||jsapi.amap.com^$domain=amap.com`
---
btw the above filter list isn't maintained anymore so you shouldn't use it
